top_entities.name: Lebanon
top_entities.news_summary: CRITICAL ONGOING (Jun 10-24): War since Mar 2 — 4,000+ killed; 1.2M displaced (16%+ of population); 40,000+ homes destroyed. Israel demolishing Lebanese villages south of Litani. OHCHR: blanket displacement orders covering 14% of territory = possible forced displacement under IHL. HRW: displacement possibly war crime.

top_entities.name: Nigeria
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 10-24): 34.8M at IPC Phase 3+ in Jun-Aug lean season; 15,000 at Phase 5 Catastrophe in Borno — first catastrophe-level in a decade. IPC Alert issued. JNIM (al-Qaeda affiliate) first-ever Nigeria attack; ISWAP expanding. WFP warns imminent funding cuts. FAO-WFP: Nigeria highest-concern hotspot globally.

top_entities.name: Anthropic
top_entities.news_summary: EXPORT CONTROL DAY 12 (Jun 10-24): Fable 5 and Mythos 5 remain suspended globally. Four bipartisan Congress members sent formal letter Jun 18 to Commerce Sec Lutnick demanding explanation by Jun 26. Anthropic publicly disputed proportionality. First-ever export control applied to commercially-deployed AI model. G7 summit Jun 17: Dario Amodei participated in voluntary AI safety commitments.

top_entities.name: Ukraine
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 10-24): Daily Russian strikes continue. Jun 23: Ukraine struck Crimea bridge; Jun 22: child killed; Jun 20: Kharkiv apartment struck; Jun 18: drones hit Moscow refinery. 62,716 UN-verified civilian casualties (16,126 dead). 210,000+ alleged war crimes. Special Tribunal for crime of aggression active in Council of Europe.

top_entities.name: Bolivia
top_entities.news_summary: CRISIS RESOLVED + EMERGENCY (Jun 10-24): Blockade crisis ended Jun 23 — all blockades lifted after Paz-COB agreement Jun 19. 17+ dead during protests (many denied medical access due to blockades); 365 arrested. Gov declared 90-day national state of emergency Jun 20 restricting mass gatherings. Highlights human rights violations during militarized protest response.

top_entities.name: Yemen
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 10-24): 69+ UN staff + dozens of NGO staff arbitrarily detained by Houthis. Houthis raided UN facilities. 19.5M need humanitarian assistance. Fuel up 150%, food up 50% since Hormuz closure. Famine risk elevated. Country fragmenting.

top_entities.name: South Sudan
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 10-24): 10M (84% of population) need humanitarian assistance; 267,000+ displaced in Jonglei in 2026; airstrikes on civilian areas; sexual violence; forced recruitment escalating since Mar 2025. Aid weaponized. UN experts Apr 2026: urged immediate civilian protection. Humanitarian access nearly impossible.

top_entities.name: xAI/Grok
top_entities.news_summary: WHISTLEBLOWER LAWSUIT ACTIVE (Jun 9-24): Devin Kim (president of Center for AI Safety) v. xAI/SpaceX in Santa Clara Superior Court — first AI safety whistleblower retaliation case; fired before safety presentation; Jimmy Ba (co-founder) named. Allegations: inadequate safeguards vs discrimination/WMD/misinformation. Canadian OPC PIPEDA ruling also active. SpaceX IPO launched Jun 12 on Nasdaq ($1.75T valuation).

top_entities.name: Rwanda
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING WATCH (Jun 10-24): HRW 'Death Was Everywhere' Jun 10 documentation active. M23/Washington Agreements stalled — Rwandan troops not withdrawn; US Treasury sanctions on Rwandan military commanders (Mar 2) remain. Rwanda rejected HRW findings. DRC ceasefire repeatedly violated. Composite 41.8 — 1.8 above functional/developing boundary.

top_entities.name: Israel
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 10-24): Gaza: 72,599+ killed; 1,000+ since ceasefire (Jun 17); UNRWA blocked; aid entries dropped to 590/week from 4,200. Lebanon: war since Mar 2 — 4,000+ killed, 1.2M displaced (16%+ of population); 40,000+ homes destroyed; HRW: displacement orders possible war crime. Six-country coordinated West Bank sanctions Jun 9.

top_entities.name: Burkina Faso
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 10-24): 52.8M face acute food insecurity in West Africa/Sahel Jun-Aug. Drone strikes killing civilians likely war crimes (ICRC). Starvation weaponized. 70% of 2M+ displaced in region are in Burkina Faso. 3.5M+ trapped in besieged areas. UN Special Procedures Jun 2026: systematic enforced disappearances at crimes-against-humanity threshold.

top_entities.name: Mali
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 10-24): Crisis-hunger population surged 64% since 2023; WFP rations reduced. UN Special Procedures Jun 2026: systematic enforced disappearances at crimes-against-humanity threshold. Drone strikes killing civilians. JNIM expanding into Nigeria.

top_entities.name: Democratic Republic of C
top_entities.news_summary: DUAL CRITICAL (Jun 10-24): Ebola: 1,048 confirmed cases/267 deaths Jun 21 — 2nd-largest outbreak ever, fastest-growing in history (250 deaths in 37 days vs 78 for 2014 W.Africa). No vaccine for Bundibugyo strain. 70+ medics infected. M23/Rwanda HRW report: forced recruitment, child soldiers, arbitrary detention, torture; Rwanda meets belligerent occupation threshold.

top_entities.name: Iran
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 10-24): 784+ executions YTD — highest in 37 years. 12 hanged May 31, 6 on Jun 1 including 1 public. 24 protest participants executed since March. Weekly hunger strike at 56 prisons 120+ consecutive weeks. UN: 18 protesters executed in 2026; 78 at imminent risk. Amnesty: mass arbitrary arrests ongoing.

top_entities.name: Russia
top_entities.news_summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 10-24): Daily strikes on Ukraine (Jun 18-23 documented). Political prisoners 1,217+. 1,700+ Ukrainians arbitrarily detained incommunicado; torture widespread and systematic. ICC prosecutor intimidation documented. 210,000+ alleged war crimes. Special Tribunal for crime of aggression active in Council of Europe.

sector_alerts.title: Sudan El Obeid — RSF drone campaign Day 12+; 29-country atrocity warning; US State Dept statement active
sector_alerts.summary: RSF drone campaign on El Obeid entering Day 12+ as of Jun 24. Jun 22 US State Dept formal atrocity-threat statement. 29-country UNHRC coalition warning Jun 18. Strike killed 13 including 8 children. 500,000 at imminent atrocity risk. Power station and hospitals destroyed. No ceasefire compliance detected.

sector_alerts.title: DRC Ebola — 1,048 cases/267 deaths Jun 21; fastest-growing outbreak ever; no vaccine; 2nd-largest on record
sector_alerts.summary: Jun 21 WHO: 1,048 confirmed cases, 267 deaths. Bundibugyo strain: no available vaccine. 37 days to 250 deaths vs 78 days in 2014 W.Africa outbreak. 70+ medics infected. Contact tracing at 45% vs 90% needed due to M23 conflict. PHEIC since May 16.

sector_alerts.title: Anthropic Fable/Mythos export control Day 12 — Congressional inquiry deadline Jun 26; response pending
sector_alerts.summary: Day 12 of global suspension. Four bipartisan members of Congress formally demanded explanation from Commerce Sec Lutnick by Jun 26 — response due in 2 days. Models remain offline. Precedent-setting governance event for entire AI industry.

sector_alerts.title: DOJ 2026 National Healthcare Fraud Takedown — 455 charged, $6.5B — largest in history; sector context for UnitedHealth/Humana
sector_alerts.summary: Jun 23 DOJ announced 2026 National Healthcare Fraud Takedown: 455 defendants charged including 90 licensed medical professionals; $6.5B false claims; 1,079 CMS provider suspensions; 1,403 billing privilege revocations. Most Medicaid Fraud Control Unit participation in history (50 states). Reinforces aggressive DOJ enforcement environment directly relevant to UnitedHealth, Humana, CVS, Cigna, and Centene active probes.

sector_alerts.title: EU AI Act Aug 2 enforcement machinery activation — 39 days; GPAI fines up to 3% global turnover or 15M EUR
sector_alerts.summary: Aug 2, 2026 (39 days): EU Commission AI Office gains formal enforcement authority over GPAI model providers. Fines up to 3% global annual turnover or 15M EUR (whichever higher). GPAI Code of Practice (Jul 10 2025) is compliance framework. Whistleblower protections for AI Act reports activate Aug 2.

sector_alerts.title: Lebanon war ongoing — 1.2M displaced, 4,000+ killed, 40,000+ homes destroyed; OHCHR and HRW: possible war crimes
sector_alerts.summary: Ongoing Lebanon war since Mar 2 2026. 1.2M displaced (16%+ of population). 4,000+ killed. 40,000+ homes destroyed. OHCHR: blanket displacement orders covering 14% of territory = possible forced displacement under IHL. HRW Mar 23: possible war crime.

sector_alerts.title: Sahel famine season — 52.8M at acute food insecurity risk Jun-Aug; Burkina/Mali/Niger/Nigeria; starvation weaponized
sector_alerts.summary: FAO Jun 2026: 52.8M face acute food insecurity in West Africa/Sahel Jun-Aug 2026 lean season. Nigeria: 34.8M at IPC 3+; 15,000 at Phase 5 Catastrophe in Borno (first in decade). Somalia: real and credible famine risk in Burhakaba confirmed. ICRC: starvation used as method of warfare. Drone strikes killing civilians likely constitute war crimes. Only 15% of humanitarian response funded.

sector_alerts.title: Fortune 500 DEI disclosures fell 65% in 2026; EEOC enforcement; Apple NLRB Towson escalation
sector_alerts.summary: Fortune 500 DEI disclosure participation fell from 377 companies (2025) to 131 (2026) — 65% drop. EEOC Feb 26 letter to Fortune 500 CEOs: Title VII compliance reminder. Apple Towson NLRB escalation: 54-member Congressional Labor Caucus called for NLRB investigation; IAM ULP charge filed.
